data_sources: backups/ideas_2026-04-18.json (10-day-old idea snapshot, 5 ideas — live Google Sheet was not directly accessible from this run)
_caveat: Live Google Sheet 'posts' tab was not directly readable in this environment. Re-run keyword-cluster-mapper after a fresh sheet sync to incorporate any ideas added/changed since 2026-04-18.

spokes.keyword: blueberry yogurt frozen bites for dogs

clusters.notes: 5 published treat recipes orphaned without a hub pillar. HIGHEST priority — biggest cluster with most internal-link compounding potential. Writing this pillar would create 5 immediate inbound links.
3 published savory-meal recipes lack a hub. Pillar would link to all 3 spokes and unlock more cooked-meal spokes (stews, beef recipes, fish).

spokes.keyword: dog leash reactivity training threshold method

clusters.notes: 1 published + 1 queued spoke. Pillar would tie together recall, reactivity, basic obedience, puppy training. Caveat: the published recall post is itself reasonably broad — could be promoted to pillar instead of writing a new one. Decide before drafting.

spokes.keyword: fi vs tractive gps dog tracker comparison

clusters.notes: Highest BUYER-INTENT cluster — affiliate revenue lever. Pillar + 4-6 spokes (Whistle review, Tractive review, GPS for hikers, GPS for escape artists) would dominate this niche. Write this once you have ~3 queued spokes ready.

pillar.keyword: complete dog food guide kibble fresh raw

spokes.keyword: how to read dog food labels AAFCO

clusters.notes: Only 1 queued spoke. Cluster needs both pillar and more spokes (kibble vs fresh cost analysis, AAFCO standards explained, raw feeding basics, protein percentages by life stage).
THIN CLUSTER (1 spoke). Two paths: (a) merge with grooming-and-shedding into a 'spring-pet-care' hub, OR (b) grow with summer-heat, fall-tick-prevention, winter-paw-care spokes. Flag for user review.

Pillar published — needs spokes. Suggested next ideas: FURminator review, Maxpower Planet brush review, breed-specific shedding (German Shepherd, Husky, Lab), shedding diet/supplement tweaks, bathing-frequency-for-shedders.
